pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; using it with Java 21 causes compilation errors or runtime failures due to deprecated APIs and lack of bytecode compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 APIs, potentially missing Java 21 features or causing incompatibilities if the runtime is strictly Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-checkstyle-plugin to a newer snapshot version.
Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a newer snapshot version.
